│  A   │  B   │  C   │  D   │  E   │
├──────┼──────┼──────┼──────┼──────┤
│    1 │    2 │    3 │    4 │    5 │
├──────┼──────┼──────┼──────┼──────┤
│   10 │   20 │   30 │   40 │   50 │
├──────┼──────┼──────┼──────┼──────┤
│  100 │  200 │  300 │  400 │  500 │
├──────┼──────┼──────┼──────┼──────┤
│ 1000 │ 2000 │ 3000 │ 4000 │ 5000 │
└──────┴──────┴──────┴──────┴──────┘
C:\Users\gabri\OneDrive\Projects\vistab\src\vistab.py:1548: DeprecationWarning: table.header() is deprecated and will be removed. Please use table.set_header() instead.
  warnings.warn("table.header() is deprecated and will be removed. Please use table.set_header() instead.", DeprecationWarning)
